ItacPersonItem.Notes: Agostino was Annibale`s brother, and Ludovico`s cousin. Agostino`s association with the Gelati is doubted by Roberto Zapperi, Annibale Carracci. Ritratto di artista da giovane (1989). Giovanna Perini, `Ut pictura poesis` in Italian Academies of the Sixteenth Century Warburg Institute Colloquia (1995) pp. 122-23, agrees with Zapperi. Agostino`s portrait is in Malvasia, Felsina pittrice, I, p. 355.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
